title: Japanese Cazuela Hash
description: A Japanese-inspired breakfast dish made with crispy cazuela hash, golden onions, and melted butter.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the cazuela and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced onions and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced hashed and cook until crispy, about 3 minutes.
Serve hot, topped with additional butter if desired.
